signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, as just released data shows—this exceeds the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid oil price volatility from the Iran conflict but falls short of market forecasts of 2.4%[1][3].
